data.title: Emas Melemah, Eskalasi Iran Tekan Safe Haven?

titles.default: Emas Melemah, Eskalasi Iran Tekan Safe Haven?
titles.id: Emas Melemah, Eskalasi Iran Tekan Safe Haven?
titles.en: Gold Weakens, Iran's Escalation Pressures Safe Havens?

data.content:
Gold fell on Monday (March 30), erasing its first weekly gain since the war began, after the Iran-backed Houthis entered the conflict and the US increased military personnel in the region. Spot gold fell 1.3% to $4,417.63/oz in Asia, while the dollar remained relatively stable.

Pressure stemmed from a surge in oil, which has kept inflation risks high, leading the market to believe global interest rates could remain tight or even turn negative for non-yielding gold. Additional risks arise from potential central bank selling and liquidation of investor positions, following the example of the Turkish central bank selling/swapping gold at the start of the war. (asd)

Gold Price at the Time of Release of This Analysis Was at $4,470

- Buy if the price moves to $4,441

- Sell if the price moves to $4,485

Resistance 2: $4,546

Resistance 1: $4,502

Support 1: $4,414

Support 2: $4,370

Disclaimer:

This article is analytical in nature and is not a definitive reference. Please consider the impact of fundamental and technical developments on trading before making any investment decisions.

Disclaimer:

contents.en:
Emas turun pada Senin (30/3), menghapus kenaikan mingguan pertamanya sejak perang dimulai, setelah Houthi yang didukung Iran masuk konflik dan AS menambah personel militer di kawasan. Spot gold turun 1,3% ke $4.417,63/oz pada sesi Asia, sementara dolar relatif stabil.

Tekanan datang dari lonjakan minyak yang menjaga risiko inflasi tinggi, sehingga pasar menilai suku bunga global bisa bertahan ketat atau naik negatif untuk emas yang non-yielding. Risiko tambahan muncul dari potensi penjualan bank sentral dan likuidasi posisi investor, setelah contoh penjualan/swap emas oleh bank sentral Turki di awal perang.(asd)

Harga Emas Pada Saat analisis ini Di Rilis Berada Pada Level $ 4.470

- Beli jika harga bergerak di Level $ 4.441

- Jual jika harga bergerak di Level $ 4.485

Resistance 2: $ 4.546

Resistance 1: $ 4.502

Support 1: $ 4.414

Support 2: $ 4.370

Disclaimer :

Artikel ini bersifat analitis dan bukan merupakan referensi definitif. Harap pertimbangkan dampak perkembangan fundamental dan teknikal terhadap perdagangan sebelum mengambil keputusan investasi apa pun.

data.author: Arul

data.title: Harga Minyak Brent Stabil di Tengah Ketidakpastian Pasar Global

titles.default: Harga Minyak Brent Stabil di Tengah Ketidakpastian Pasar Global
titles.id: Harga Minyak Brent Stabil di Tengah Ketidakpastian Pasar Global
titles.en: Brent Oil Prices Hold Steady Amid Global Market Uncertainty

data.content:
Harga minyak mentah Brent menunjukkan pergerakan yang relatif stabil pada perdagangan terbaru, dipengaruhi oleh ketidakpastian pasokan global serta ekspektasi permintaan energi yang tetap kuat. Brent, yang merupakan salah satu acuan utama harga minyak dunia, terus menjadi perhatian investor karena pergerakannya mencerminkan kondisi ekonomi global.

Beberapa faktor utama yang mempengaruhi harga Brent antara lain kebijakan produksi dari negara-negara penghasil minyak, ketegangan geopolitik, serta perubahan permintaan energi di sektor industri. Pembatasan produksi oleh negara produsen besar berpotensi menjaga keseimbangan pasokan, sehingga memberikan dukungan terhadap harga minyak.

Selain itu, data ekonomi global seperti pertumbuhan industri dan tingkat inflasi juga berperan dalam menentukan prospek permintaan energi. Jika aktivitas ekonomi terus meningkat, kebutuhan energi diperkirakan ikut bertambah sehingga dapat mendorong harga Brent lebih tinggi.

Meski demikian, pasar tetap mewaspadai potensi perlambatan ekonomi global dan percepatan transisi menuju energi terbarukan, yang dapat mempengaruhi permintaan minyak dalam jangka panjang.

Faktor yang mempengaruhi harga Brent:

  1. Kebijakan produksi negara penghasil minyak
  2. Kondisi geopolitik global
  3. Pertumbuhan ekonomi dunia
  4. Permintaan energi sektor industri
  5. Perkembangan energi terbarukan

Kesimpulan:
Harga Brent masih bergerak dinamis mengikuti perkembangan fundamental pasar dan sentimen global. Investor disarankan untuk terus memantau indikator ekonomi dan kebijakan energi yang berpotensi mempengaruhi arah harga minyak.

contents.en:
Brent crude oil prices showed relatively stable movement in recent trading, influenced by global supply uncertainty and expectations of steady energy demand. Brent, one of the world’s primary oil price benchmarks, continues to attract investor attention as its movement reflects broader global economic conditions.

Several key factors affecting Brent prices include production policies from major oil-producing countries, geopolitical tensions, and changes in industrial energy demand. Production controls by major producers may help maintain supply balance, providing support to oil prices.

Additionally, global economic data such as industrial growth and inflation rates play an important role in shaping energy demand prospects. If economic activity continues to improve, energy consumption is expected to increase, potentially pushing Brent prices higher.

However, markets remain cautious about the risk of global economic slowdown and the accelerating transition toward renewable energy, both of which may influence long-term oil demand.

Factors influencing Brent prices:

  1. Production policies of oil-producing countries
  2. Global geopolitical conditions
  3. Worldwide economic growth
  4. Industrial energy demand
  5. Renewable energy developments

Conclusion:
Brent prices remain dynamic, driven by market fundamentals and global sentiment. Investors are advised to monitor economic indicators and energy policies that may influence future price movements.

data.author: Cahyo
